text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. My classmate's victory party is going to be
fantastic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Since it's going to be held in a classroom, it might
be nice to suggest some decorative ideas.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what type of cake would be best for the
occasion? Ordering one from a famous shop
would be nice, but decorating a cake together
with everyone sounds delightful too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, in front of the station earlier, I
happened to be handed a flier for a cake shop.
Perhaps I should have a proper look at it right
away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is so preoccupied with planning the
party that she ends up skipping training.
